title: Mister Scoutmaster
writer: Rice E. Cochran, Leonard Praskins, Barney Slater
actors: Clifton Webb, Edmund Gwenn, George Winslow
plot: Snobby TV star (Clifton Webb) worries that he is out of touch with the younger generation and that's why his TV show is failing. He becomes a Boy Scout leader in an effort to "get in touch." Overnight hikes and other adventures fo...
